context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 of the Multi-Lens Evaluator Panel. Sprint 1 (commit 5dc7a5e) added evaluator.panel config + a lens-aware runSingleLensEval helper (currently injecting an inline lens-focus string) + bounded fan-out + reconcile() wiring. Sprint 2 replaces the inline string with a built-in lens prompt catalog (correctness/security/regression/quality + generic fallback) and emits each lens's pass/fail verdict via telemetry/history, attributable by lens name.

completedSprints.title: Panel config, lens-aware evaluator, and reconcile wiring
completedSprints.summary: Added evaluator.panel { enabled, lenses, maxConcurrent } to EvaluatorSectionSchema + all default literals. Refactored runAgentEvaluation: off path (panel off/<2 lenses) = one judge call byte-identical; on path = mapBounded fan-out (chunk batching, peak<=maxConcurrent) of runSingleLensEval(...,lens) then reconcile(contractId,1,lensResults,timestamp) -> evaluator='panel'. runSingleLensEval injects an inline lens-focus string when lens provided, empty when undefined. New test src/orchestrator/evaluator-agent.test.ts mocks providers/factory createClient + agentic-loop runAgenticLoop. Commit 5dc7a5e.

gitNote: The working tree has pre-existing uncommitted changes UNRELATED to this sprint (graph CLI: src/graph/cli.ts, src/cli/commands/graph.ts; agent .md files; .bober artifacts). When committing, stage ONLY the files you create/modify for THIS sprint with explicit paths (git add src/orchestrator/eval-lenses.ts src/orchestrator/eval-lenses.test.ts src/orchestrator/evaluator-agent.ts src/orchestrator/evaluator-agent.test.ts). NEVER run `git add -A` or `git add .`.
